queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of checking account balances below 0 DM to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on credit risk determinants.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the association between savings balances below 100 DM and decreased likelihood of credit default.
